assignmentSuggestion.brief: Frame Espanyol as the real selection problem between Champions League legs: who can start, who should be protected, and what the derby means for the title race and Madrid return.
deliverables: Dispatch recommendation grounded in the live scout
assignmentSuggestion.title: Espanyol between the legs

assignmentTopic: Espanyol vs Barcelona / rotation and fitness before Atlético second leg
